title.en: Now, the idea of becoming the Origin Realm has ...

content.en:
"The Endless Lord has become the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor!!"

The Lord of Chaos still remembers that the Lord of Endless and a group of geniuses from the other side came to the Chaos Domain to participate in the Genius Tournament on the other side, and later joined the Wind Tooth Island with the Lord of Tiandu.

At that time, the Endless Lord was only a genius in the Bone Transformation Realm.

Unexpectedly, not too long has passed, and the Lord of Endless has become the Origin Realm.

There are quite a few geniuses on the other side of Wind Tooth Island, but there are only a few Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

As a member of Wind Tooth Island, he naturally knew how difficult it was to become the Origin Upper Realm.

In order to break through the Origin Upper Realm, he went to the central part of the country for countless years, but as a result, he offended a huge force and made Fengya Island pay a great price, which saved him.

In fact, he didn't leave Fengya Island, but he was disheartened, coupled with the secret injury of the origin on the other side, which caused him to be unable to break through to the Origin Upper Realm, so he returned to the Taichao Domain.

Now, the idea of becoming the Origin Realm has been extinguished much earlier.

But knowing that the Endless Lord had broken through to the Origin Upper Realm, he was still extremely surprised and felt incredible.

But.

In the entire seventy-two domains in the eastern part of the Eternal Realm, there were very few Origin Realms where Ye Tian had become the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and they had no channel to know this information.

......

After another period of time, Ye Tian finally stabilized the realm.

When Ye Tian came out, the Lord of Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice and Rain came over and congratulated him on becoming the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and also became the fifth Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor on Wind Tooth Island.

Since then, Ye Tian's status is second only to the Lord of the Wind Fang, and they are almost the same as the Lord of Ice and Rain.

But.

He was about to test his other side of the origin, but found that the other side of the Wind Tooth Island's other side of the origin tablet could not test his other side of the origin.

So, he went to the Lord of the Wind Teeth to inquire.

The Lord of the Wind Teeth smiled and said, "Lord of Endless, that Origin Tablet on the Other Shore can only show the Origin of the Other Shore below 5 million, and your Origin of the Other Shore must be more than 5 million, so it is not displayed." Let's go, I'll take you to another place on our Wind Tooth Island. "

The Lord of Wind Tooth took Ye Tian to a special time and space on Wind Tooth Island.

Airplanes!!!

They passed through layers of space-time formations and came to a mysterious island.

"This is the most important island of Wind Tooth Island, Wind Tooth Island, only the five of us are qualified to enter. The Lord of the Wind Teeth said.

Over here.

Ye Tian saw the Origin Golden Tree on the other side of Fengya Island, but there was not a single leaf on it, and it would take a long time to give birth to the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side.

He also saw a huge monument in total darkness.

"Endless Lord, this is the Ancestral Origin Tablet on the other side, you can test your Origin on the other side. The Lord of the Wind Fang introduced: "If the Origin of the Other Shore reaches 10 million, it will be the middle stage of the Origin of the Other Shore, if the Origin of the Other Shore reaches 30 million, it will be the late stage of the Origin of the Other Shore, and if the Origin of the Other Shore reaches 100 million, it will be the peak of the Origin Upper Realm." Those top Origin Upper Realm powerhouses in the land of Eternal Beyond have almost all reached the late stage of the Origin on the other side. As for the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, almost all of them are at the peak of the Origin Upper Realm, and they still have to master the Origin Ancestor on the other side. "

Ye Tian walked to this ancestral source tablet on the other side and began to test his origin on the other side.

Soon.

A number emerges.

6.99 million

This data is very good, and it is not too far from the mid-stage realm of the other side's origin.

Then.

The Lord of Wind Fang said again: "Endless Lord, there are still many inheritances here, you can browse carefully, you will have a better understanding of the future cultivation of the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor." Of course, even those of us Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors couldn't just take the resources of Wind Tooth Island. If you really want to take resources, you either need to replace them with other resources, or you have to negotiate it. Otherwise, we would have run out of resources!"

Ye Tian also nodded, and also felt that this decision was normal.

"Endless Lord, you can cultivate here, there is also a Origin Dao Tree on the other side, if you cultivate there, your comprehension will improve a lot, and it will help you comprehend the rules of the Origin on the other side. "Lord of the Wind Fangs.

"Good!"

Ye Tian then opened up a palace near the Origin Dao Tree on the other side, and cultivated here.

After that, he went to the Heritage Pavilion here to browse.

Although there are not many inheritances here, they are all precious, and they are all traded or collected by a few originators, or left by themselves.

Ye Tian studied day by day, and he had a better understanding of the cultivation of the Origin Upper Realm.

"Fengya Island doesn't seem to have the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side?"

Ye Tian frowned.

He went to consult the Lord of the Wind Fangs, and received an answer.

"Lord of Endless, Wind Tooth Island does not have the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, not only Wind Tooth Island, but also the other top forces on the Eternal Shore do not have the Origin Ancestral Body Method. The forces that truly possess the inheritance of the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side are only inherited by the nine top overlord forces in the central region. Forces like Xuanyin Pavilion don't have the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side!"

"But there are also non-hegemon-level forces in the central region, but they have mastered the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, where did they get the inheritance of the Origin Ancestor on the other side?" Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Lord of the Windfangs has revealed a secret.

"This has something to do with the Origin Ancestral Mountain. The Origin Ancestral Mountain is a very special place in the land of eternity, there are many inheritance of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, and you can go there to fight for the opportunity with the Origin Ancestral Order in hand, and you may have the hope of obtaining a Origin Ancestor Body method on the other side, but you can only accept the inheritance and cannot teach it. "

Origin Ancestral Order!

Ye Tian had never heard of this treasure, but he also knew that it must be extremely difficult to obtain.

At this time, the Lord of Wind Tooth said again: "The last time Xuanyin Giant City Fair, there were thirteen Origin Ancestral Orders for auction, but unfortunately our Wind Tooth Island couldn't compete. "

From talking to the Lord of the Wind Fangs, he knew how difficult it was to obtain the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

After his cultivation is improved and his strength is increased in the future, it will also be a troublesome matter to obtain the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side!

And.

Like the Origin Upper Realm that he came out of a force like Wind Tooth Island, the nine top overlord forces in the middle of the country would not want it, and it was unrealistic for him to want to obtain the inheritance of the Origin Ancestral Body on the other side from those nine top overlord forces.

"I'm still far away!"

Ye Tian didn't remember to seek the inheritance of the Origin Ancestor on the other side.

For him, now is to improve his cultivation as much as possible and improve his strength.

That's the most important thing!
